Injuries • General • Absurd Attraction Aura

Injury Card

Absurd Attraction Aura

Objects seemingly have a mind of their own in your vicinity, gravitating towards you in a bizarre display of magnetism. It's as if you've become a walking anomaly, attracting items with a peculiar sense of humor.

Treatment

Creating a designated space for items and organizing your surroundings can help reduce the chaos caused by the attraction aura. Being mindful of your proximity to objects can prevent inadvertent collisions.

Details

  • Category: General

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 4 Hit Points

  • Duration: 60

  • Status Effect: Grappled

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • General • Dizzying Dance Dilemma

Injury Card

Dizzying Dance Dilemma

The world spins around you in a dizzying display of disorientation, turning your balance into a precarious waltz with unseen partners. It's a dance routine you never signed up for, with each step feeling like a misstep waiting to happen.

Treatment

Finding a stable surface to rest on and focusing on a fixed point can help alleviate the vertigo induced by the dizzying dance dilemma. Slow, deliberate movements are key to navigating this impromptu dance floor without stumbling.

Details

  • Category: General

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 80

  • Status Effect: Charmed

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.
